title: Nerv Base construction stages
wikitext:
[]: Nerv Base construction stages             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Sun Jan 27, 2013 11:07 am In Epi. 17 Gendo and his shadow are talking about Tokyo-3. One of them says that construction on the seventh stage will be completed shortly. What was this stage?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 27, 2013 11:47 am Could you post the full dialogue from this scene? A screenshot would also be nice.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jan 27, 2013 12:13 pm http://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:Episode_17_Scene_05 Episode 17, Platinum subtitles wrote: FUYUTSUKI: The city, a paradise made by mankind. IKARI: Once driven from Paradise, man had no choice but to escape to this earthly existence, side by side with death. Our own paradise, created by the resourcefulness that this weakest of beings was forced to develop. FUYUTSUKI: To protect ourselves from the fear of death, to satiate our thirst for pleasure, a paradise we created ourselves. This city's truly such a paradise. A armed city made to protect us. IKARI (OFF): A city of cowards fleeing from the outside world, filled with enemies. FUYUTSUKI: Cowards do live longer. That's fine. New Tokyo-3, Nerv's camouflaged intercept fortress. The continually-delayed seventh construction phase will be finished soon. At long last, it will be completed. FUYUTSUKI (OFF): How will you report Unit 04's accident to the Committee? IKARI (OFF): Just as the facts state, the cause is unknown. FUYUTSUKI: But at this stage, it's a catastrophic loss. IKARI: Unit 04 and the 2nd Branch are acceptable. Even with the S2 engine, we may have lost the sample, but we still have the data in Germany. This installation and Unit 01 will be sufficient. FUYUTSUKI: But the Committee was furious. IKARI: Of course, it was an unscheduled accident. FUYUTSUKI: Seele must also be frantically adjusting the schedule. IKARI (OFF): Incidents not depicted in the Dead Sea Scrolls can occur. This ought to teach the old men a lesson.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 27, 2013 12:18 pm Perhaps they are simply talking about the repair work for Nerv after Ramiel fell on it. They were repairing it up until Episode 18, when Zeruel generally fucked it up and they left.

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Sun Jan 27, 2013 12:47 pm alright...I just noticed it and couldn't think of anything it could be attached to so I wanted to check to make sure I didn't miss anything, thanks guys
